ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND(LEN( Red_Phone__c ) <> 0, NOT ( AND(
LEFT(Red_Phone__c,1)="(", MID(Red_Phone__c,5,1)=")", MID(Red_Phone__c,6,1)=" ", MID(Red_Phone__c,10,1)="-",
CONTAINS("0123456789", MID (Red_Phone__c, 2, 1)), CONTAINS("0123456789", MID (Red_Phone__c, 3, 1)), CONTAINS("0123456789", MID (Red_Phone__c, 4, 1)), CONTAINS("0123456789", MID (Red_Phone__c, 7, 1)), CONTAINS("0123456789", MID (Red_Phone__c, 8, 1)), CONTAINS("0123456789", MID (Red_Phone__c, 9, 1)), CONTAINS("0123456789", MID (Red_Phone__c, 11, 1)), CONTAINS("0123456789", MID (Red_Phone__c, 12, 1)), CONTAINS("0123456789", MID (Red_Phone__c, 13, 1)), CONTAINS("0123456789", MID (Red_Phone__c, 14, 1)),
OR(AND(LEN(Red_Phone__c)<=20,MID(Red_Phone__c, 15,2)=" x",
CONTAINS("0123456789", MID (Red_Phone__c, 17, 1)), CONTAINS("0123456789", MID (Red_Phone__c, 18, 1)), CONTAINS("0123456789", MID (Red_Phone__c, 19, 1)), CONTAINS("0123456789", MID (Red_Phone__c, 20, 1)) ), LEN(Red_Phone__c)<=14 ) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You Must use numbers or exact phone format (123) 444-5577
